meaning: bring your own booze(或bottle)(用于宴会请柬上等)请自带酒来
examples: BYOB is a short way of saying "Bring Your Own Bottle".
BYOB: Bringing your own reusable bottle or bag is frugal and green.
Here's a frequently used party acronym, BYOB: Bring Your Own Bottle.
This is no doubt influenced by the fact that Amanti Vino is surrounded by restaurants, most of which are BYOB.
One of its prime features is an 11, 000-square-foot clubhouse -- with a BYOB policy, a dance floor and plenty of heat pumped in.
